narrative:
Portage Twp township has 876 registered voters, with 54.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.9%, a clear Republican lean of 10.2 percentage points.
